title: Add user input validation to registration endpoint
description: The /api/register endpoint currently accepts any input without validation. Add proper validation for email format, password strength, and username length before saving to the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Email must be a valid format (RFC 5322)
Password must be at least 12 characters with mixed case, numbers, and symbols
Username must be 3-30 characters, alphanumeric and underscores only
All validation errors return 400 with a clear message
Valid input passes through to existing registration logic unchanged
securityConsiderations: Prevent injection attacks through username/email fields. Avoid leaking information about existing users in error messages.
